# 🔍  Watch exactly what your visitors do on your site (in real-time)

## Metadata
- **From:** Syed Balkhi - WPBeginner <support@wpbeginner.com>
- **Date:** 2025-05-10 13:30:00
- **Source:** Gmail IMAP
- **UID:** 753

## Body
Hey Muhammad,

Ever wondered what your website visitors are actually doing when
they land on your site?

Most website analytics tools give you numbers and stats of what
users do.

Unfortunately, this doesn’t always give you the full picture of
what’s working and what needs to be fixed.

This is why I use and recommend Microsoft Clarity 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._X19zPTBhNjJ4bzR6ZGdjZ3ViMDZydGpjIn0.2kKdu5tdMSPKISQ0puEF4U8PQ4hMm8kRBNoeyiliKP0 )
.

With Clarity, you can see website heatmaps and user session
recordings.

Basically, you get session replays on how individual visitors
used your website, so you can improve your website's user
experience.

In the past, you had to pay for premium tools to get these
insights ... but Microsoft has made it free.

I wrote about how to install Microsoft Clarity in WordPress 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._X19zPTBhNjJ4bzR6ZGdjZ3ViMDZydGpjIn0.2kKdu5tdMSPKISQ0puEF4U8PQ4hMm8kRBNoeyiliKP0 )
, step by step.

More Heatmap Tools for WordPress

Looking for more heatmap tools?

Regular analytics give you stats, but heatmaps and session
recordings show you how, where, and why users interact with your
site.

We’ve put in countless hours testing different heatmap and
session recording tools on WordPress sites of all sizes.

Here’s our handpicked list 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._X19zPTBhNjJ4bzR6ZGdjZ3ViMDZydGpjIn0.WuKn5X_zViZv0CRIzHmXpumKARElTZpoTYpvgQ-pmGo )
 of the best heatmap and session recording tools for WordPress.

Don’t Forget to Monitor Your Website Uptime

While tracking user behavior is crucial, keeping your WordPress
site running smoothly is equally important. After all, the best
analytics in the world won't help if your site is slow, outdated,
or worse – down!

This is why you’ll need to monitor your website uptime and ensure
it is always live.

With our WordPress site maintenance plans 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._X19zPTBhNjJ4bzR6ZGdjZ3ViMDZydGpjIn0.qnzOGuma-2CbOQo5UWg2aS3EXrPGGxKmyGf7q5o4cJQ )
, you can get 24/7 website monitoring, and more.

Until next time,

Syed Balkhi
Founder of WPBeginner
